name: Stir-Fried Fiddleheads
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean fiddleheads and remove the skin. Trim the ends.
2. Mince garlic, scallion, and ginger.
3. Heat a wok almost to smoking point and add oil.
4. Add garlic, scallion, and ginger; stir-fry for 10 seconds.
5. Add fiddleheads (drained if using canned); stir-fry for 30 seconds.
6. Add hot water and cook the ferns for 1 to 2 minutes, or until crisp yet tender.
7. Stir in soy sauce and oyster sauce; cook for an additional 20 seconds.
8. Adjust seasonings as needed, adding more oyster sauce if desired.
9. Serve immediately.
Per serving: 83 calories; 4 gm protein; 5 gm carbohydrates; 6 gm fat; 0.8 gm saturated fat; 1 mg cholesterol; 117 mg sodium.
